title: CalPERS Private Equity Program Update — Board Presentation (June 2025)
relevant_snippets: • EDCI launched with 7 GPs and 9 LPs/IMs representing about $4 trillion in assets under management (AUM) and
• Buyout at $63.3bn (68.7%), Growth at $21.9bn (23.7%), Opportunistic at $3.9bn (4.3%), Venture
• U.S. portfolio at $62.9bn (67.3%), Europe at $20.9bn (22.4%), Emerging Markets at $6.0bn
now has over 350 GPs and 150 LPs/IMs representing about $38 trillion of AUM
• Buyout commitments went from 91% in FY 2020-21 to 58% in FY 2023-24
• Within Buyout, Large/Mega commitments went from a majority (73%) in FY 2021-22 to a minority (43%) in FY 2023-24
• Growth and Venture went from 9% of commitments in FY 2020-21 to 43% in FY 2023-24
• US accounted for 74% of NAV at 3/31/23, and the US-
